tasks.title: Tasks

date_end.description: Optional deadline when action is progress.

employees.title: Employees
employees.description: Employee IDs for project members and guests (replaces membership set; Upservice requires at least one).

file_list.title: File List
file_list.description: Attachment IDs or uploaded file UUIDs from POST /v1/files/.

manager_id.title: Manager Id
manager_id.description: Employee ID of the directory manager.

date_end.title: Date End
date_end.description: Due date (ISO 8601). Required for task, meeting, agreement, agreement_task; optional for ticket.

responsible_departments.title: Responsible Departments
responsible_departments.description: Department IDs (task/agreement_task only; mutually exclusive with responsible)

file_list.title: File List
file_list.description: Files to attach. Each item is an existing attachment ID (int) or an uploaded file UUID (str) from POST /v1/files/.

co_responsibles.title: Co Responsibles
co_responsibles.description: Co-responsible employee IDs (meeting attendees / acquaintance participants)

agreement_steps.title: Agreement Steps
agreement_steps.description: Agreement approval steps: list of employee ID groups (agreement)

send_logs_to_contact.title: Send Logs To Contact
send_logs_to_contact.description: Contact ID to send work logs to

new_parent.title: New Parent
new_parent.description: Target directory for records when deleting a directory with entries.

status.description: One of: todo, backlog, notassigned, progress, review, completed, cancelled, rejected, deleted, pending, outdated, ai, onhold

kind.description: One of: task, meeting, agreement, acquaintance, agreement_task, ticket

chats.title: Chats
chats.description: Linked channel chats (room UUID, channel, etc.). Filled when Upservice returns full task payload; empty on list if backend omits it.

file_list.title: File List
file_list.description: Attachment IDs or uploaded file UUIDs from POST /v1/files/.

description.title: Description
description.description: Task description. Omit to leave unchanged; use null to clear.

responsible_departments.title: Responsible Departments
responsible_departments.description: Department IDs. Omit to leave unchanged; use null to clear.

project.title: Project
project.description: Project ID. Omit to leave unchanged; use null to detach the task from a project.

sprint.title: Sprint
sprint.description: Sprint ID. Omit to leave unchanged; use null to detach the task from a sprint.

file_list.title: File List
file_list.description: Files to attach or update. Each item is an existing attachment ID (int) or an uploaded file UUID (str) from POST /v1/files/. Omit to leave unchanged.

status.description: One of: todo, backlog, notassigned, progress, review, completed, cancelled, rejected, deleted, pending

Api Key Auth.name: Authorization
Api Key Auth.description:
The project uses API Key-based authorization. The required `API Key` must be included in the `Authorization` header of each request. You can obtain your personal API Key in the corresponding section of your account settings.

**Example:**
```
Authorization: UPS-XXXX-XXXX-XXXX-XXXX
```
Ensure that your API Key remains confidential and do not share it with unauthorized parties.
